heading: Come to the studio — or we come to you
subheading: The same one-on-one care with Jane, wherever you feel most at ease.

modes.label: In studio
modes.title: Visit Jane's studio
modes.description: Slip away to Jane's calm, private home studio in San Jose — a quiet space designed for stillness, with everything already set up for you.
modes.meta: San Jose, CA · exact address shared when you book

modes.label: Mobile
modes.title: We come to you
modes.description: Prefer to stay put? Jane brings the table, fresh linens, and oils to your home, hotel, or office — you simply lie back and let the day melt away.
modes.meta: Serving the South Bay, Peninsula & East Bay
modes.note: A $50 travel fee covers Jane coming to you across the South Bay, Peninsula & East Bay — reduced to $25 for sessions of 2 hours or longer.
